jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><h3><strong>Join Udemy. Help </strong><strong>define<em> </em></strong><strong>the future of learning.</strong></h3><p>Udemy is an AI-powered skills acceleration platform built to help people learn the skills they need to succeed.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Senior Backend Engineer partners with Engineering & Product to ship the marketplace pipelines that power Udemy's catalogue and recommendation surfaces.</p>

jobs.title: Sales Development Representative
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>Udemy is an AI-powered skills acceleration platform. The Udemy Business team owns the B2B enterprise-skill platform.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Sales Development Representative partners with Account Executives and Marketing to qualify pipeline across enterprise cohorts.</p>
